Ascend C matmul_subtract_multiply_relu kernel implementation
Please retrieve an AscendC MatMul (GEMM) kernel example for Ascend 910B that demonstrates tiling with TPipe, uses MMA/CUBE for matrix multiply, and fuses bias addition and ReLU activation.

Ascend C matmul_subtract_multiply_relu kernel implementation
AscendC fused Matmul kernel example (ND format) using AscendC::Matmul with bias and post-ops subtract scalar, multiply scalar, and ReLU, including host tiling/operator and pybind integration for a custom op.

Ascend C matmul_subtract_multiply_relu kernel implementation
Please retrieve an AscendC custom matmul kernel example that uses TCubeTiling, supports optional bias, and demonstrates fusing post-ops like ReLU so I can adapt it to implement a matmul-subtract-multiply-ReLU operator.
